Canada Scores Record Trade Surplus on High Oil
headlines.summary: Canada has recorded its first trade surplus in six months, defying forecasts of a deficit thanks to surging oil and gold prices. headlines.title: Canadian Natural Says Pipeline Needed to Unlock Oil Sands Growth
headlines.summary: Canada’s oil sands can grow, but getting the barrels out of the country is a problem. This is a constraint that has defined the sector for years. headlines.title: Oil Supply Shock Worsens amid Plunging Petroleum Inventories

headlines.title: EU: Airlines Should Pay Passengers for Cancelations due to Fuel Price Surge

headlines.title: Angola's First New Refinery in 50 Years Ships Its First Fuel Cargoes
headlines.summary: The Cabinda oil refinery in Angola, the first that was built in the country since it gained independence from Portugal 50 years ago, has started shipping fuels to the domestic and international markets, in a relief to the fuel supply stress due to the Iran war.
